div.head:
No. 455.
Mr. Bayard to Mr. Pendleton.
div.p: Sir: Your dispatch No. 585, of the 22d of February last, reporting your action in declining to issue a passport to Mr. Frank Kessel, upon the ground of a discrepancy between his certificate of naturalization and his passport, was duly received.

A copy of your dispatch was communicated to the probate judge of Montgomery County, who has furnished a corrected certificate, with the statement that the clerical error in the paper furnished to Mr. Kessel was caused by the accidental use of a wrong form of certificate.
Inclosing the amended certificate of naturalization for the files of your legation,
